'''鈭歾-zh-n-ch''' ('''kazazhnechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bab|bab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bab|bab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-zh-n-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kazazhnechoko
|}
